content:
## Customer Qualification
World Blue Account is a referral-eligible business checking account in category business_checking. Use these terms only when the referred customer is opening or funding a World Blue Account; do not apply this bonus table to Blue Account or Green Fee Free Account referrals.

1. The referrer must have held their qualifying relationship for at least 90 days before the referral is credited.
2. The referred customer must place at least 25000 into the World Blue Account for the referral to qualify.
3. The same referral cannot be counted under another account program once it is submitted for World Blue Account terms.

## Reward Amounts
Apply the World Blue Account reward schedule exactly as listed:

| Recipient | Bonus |
|---|---:|
| Referrer | 300 |
| Referred customer | 150 |

The annual referral cap for this account is 8 successful referrals per referrer. Once the cap is reached, additional World Blue Account referrals should not be represented as bonus-eligible for that same annual period.

## Related Referral Pages
For comparison against other business checking offers, see "Business Checking Referral Programs." For cap handling and general eligibility review, see "Referral Limits And Eligibility."
title: World Blue Account Terms
